name: SkillPop
description: Scan, sync & share AI agent skills across every platform — from one local dashboard. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more.

name: claude-scientific-skills
description: 170+ ready-to-use AI agent skills for research, science, engineering, and analysis. Covers 250+ databases and 60+ scientific Python packages.

name: gemini-exporter
description: Automated bulk export of Google Gemini conversation history to individual JSON files using Playwright and browser automation.

name: SnapBack
description: Save & restore your entire Windows desktop session with one command — GUI apps, terminal processes, Claude Code instances, and Explorer windows.
